name: emergency-contact-field
title: Emergency Contact Field
description: Contact form with a live EmergencyContactCard preview and diallability validation.

props.name: value / defaultValue
props.type: { name: string; relationship: string; phone: string; isPrimary: boolean }

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Fires on every edit with the structured contact.

clinicalNotes: A tel-quality number matters more than a pretty one, so the field validates diallability (enough digits), not display format. When this field feeds a list, exactly one contact should be primary — selecting a new primary must demote the previous one (the parent list owns that rule; this field only sets its own isPrimary flag). The preview appears once there is a name and a diallable number.
notes: Round-2 form component; composes emergency-contact-card + field + input + label + switch.
